name: verify_email
description: Check one email saved as .eml: sender alignment, authentication results as recorded by the receiving server, and the delivery route. Classifications only — a mismatch is evidence to weigh, not a conclusion.

name: compare_pdfs
description: Compare two PDFs: byte identity, whether one file derives from the other, and what changed (pages, metadata, signature events). Reports the relationship the bytes show; it does not decide which file is the right one.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: verify_email · Private data: compare_pdfs · Public sink: verify_email.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: verify_email · Private data: compare_pdfs · Public sink: verify_email

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
